creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from "Pedro F. Giffuni" <giffunip@tutopia.com> -----

Date: Tue, 15 Jan 2013 08:23:50 -0800 (PST)
From: "Pedro F. Giffuni" <giffunip@tutopia.com>
To: "freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org" <freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org>
Cc: "wenheping@gmail.com" <wenheping@gmail.com>
Subject: Re: ports/175313: Update databases/hsqldb to version 2.2.9
X-Mailer: YahooMailWebService/0.8.130.494



I forgot there is a new .jar in the pkg-plist.

Here it goes again.

Index: hsqldb/Makefile
===================================================================
--- hsqldb/Makefile	(revision 310013)
+++ hsqldb/Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	hsqldb
-PORTVERSION=	1.8.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.9
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}_1_8_1
-DISTNAME=	hsqldb_${PORTVERSION:S/./_/g}
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}_2_2
+#DISTNAME=	hsqldb-${PORTVERSION}
 #EXTRACT_SUFX=	.zip
 
 MAINTAINER=	wenheping@gmail.com
@@ -17,16 +17,21 @@
 JAVA_VERSION=	1.6+
 USE_ANT=	yes
 USE_ZIP=	yes
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/${PORTNAME}
 BUILD_WRKSRC=	${WRKSRC}/build
 ALL_TARGET=	hsqldb hsqljdbc
 
+pre-build:
+	${MKDIR} ${WRKSRC}/doc-src
+
 do-install:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing JAR files to ${JAVAJARDIR}..."
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqldb.jar \
 		${JAVAJARDIR}/hsqldb.jar
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqljdbc.jar \
 		${JAVAJARDIR}/hsqljdbc.jar
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/sqltool.jar \
+		${JAVAJARDIR}/sqltool.jar
 	@${ECHO_MSG} " [DONE]"
 
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
